title: Ad-Astra: Canned Food
description: A mod that adds canned galacticraft to ad astra
body:
Add a new element of survival to the world of Ad Astra — canned food, ideal for deep space expeditions. The modification introduces various types of canned food into the game, which will help players survive long trips in space while away from planetary bases.

Be ready for long journeys to unknown planets or missions on space stations where resources are limited and food is worth its weight in gold. With canned food, you can not only provide your team with the necessary food, but also add new crafting and survival mechanics to the game.

Features:
Canned food is a new type of food with a long shelf life, ideal for long—term space expeditions.
New resources — New crafting and materials such as iron cans and other special components will be required to create canned food.
In addition to the mechanics of survival, canned food adds a new level of survival in conditions of limited resources and long space travel.

**You can give me ideas for improving the mod in issues.**
